title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 493.040 - Officers to procure best rates
text:
493.040.  Officers to procure best rates. — In procuring the publication of any law, proclamation, advertisement, order or notice, as in section 493.030 mentioned, the public officers shall accept of the most advantageous terms that can be obtained, not exceeding the rates limited in said section.
(RSMo 1939 § 14967) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13774; 1919 § 10402; 1909 § 588
